meaning: 亚琛[德意志联邦共和国西部城市]
examples: Aachen, the heart of the empire, became a frontier town.
Peter received his doctorate in computer science from the Technical University Aachen, Germany.
On June 2, I went with Gerhard Schroeder to the ancient city of Aachen to receive the Charlemagne Prize.
He went on to become music director at the operas of Aachen, Wiesbaden and Cologne.
Germany and Algeria have already reportedly signed a deal to lay cables stretching as far north as Aachen on the German-Belgian border.
